human_actions_pending.action: Before Phase 15: verify AudioAddict API endpoint, network identifiers, and PLS auth pattern using a live DI.fm account
human_actions_pending.context: Unofficial API — network identifiers (di vs difm, zen vs radiotunes) and PLS URL auth (query param vs path) are unconfirmed

decisions.decision: Build order: Favorites → Radio-Browser → YouTube → AudioAddict
decisions.rationale: Risk-ascending: pure DB/UI first, then public REST, then existing yt-dlp, then unofficial API last

decisions.decision: AudioAddict network count deferred to research
decisions.rationale: User confirmed there are more than 6 networks; exact list to be verified at Phase 15 start against live account

decisions.decision: is_junk_title to be moved from cover_art.py to filter_utils.py in Phase 12
decisions.rationale: Favorites star button must share the same junk-title gate as cover art — avoid duplicating logic

decisions.decision: Transient Station(id=-1) pattern for Radio-Browser preview play
decisions.rationale: Player currently assumes playing station is always a DB row; preview play must not write to DB

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 12 to plan the Favorites phase
context_notes: v1.3 milestone fully initialized. All research artifacts in .planning/research/. Phase 12 is pure DB + UI (no network) — lowest risk, fastest value. Star button in now-playing panel, FAVES DB table with UNIQUE constraint, inline Stations/Favorites toggle.
